_comment: An Azure Policy definition that DENIES resource creation when required tags are missing.
Azure Policy evaluates resource operations (create, update) against rules.
If a resource violates a policy with 'Deny' effect, the operation is blocked.
The user sees an error: 'Resource creation denied by policy: require-tags'.
In managed services, untagged resources are invisible to cost reports and
compliance audits. If someone creates a VM without a CostCenter tag, you
can't allocate its cost to the right team. This policy prevents that.
NOTE: This is a CUSTOM policy definition. Azure also has built-in policies
for tag enforcement, but custom ones let you enforce multiple tags in one policy.

properties.description: Denies creation of resources that are missing required tags: Environment, ManagedBy, CostCenter, Project. Part of Contoso NL governance framework managed by InSpark.
